vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely inaccurate regarding the current state of the biome. P1 (Yellow Pot) and P2/P4 (Black Pot) appear to be empty or contain only soil/debris. P3 (Black Pot) contains the white rabbit anchor but lacks the expected Pothos foliage.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of white, crystalline-like fragments (likely perlite or mineral deposits) in the lower black pot.
biome_observations.anomalies: A single, small, green, uncatalogued sprout is visible in the lower black pot, which has shown slight vertical elongation over the 5-day period.

temporal_deltas.t2_to_t1: The small sprout in the lower black pot shows slight upward growth.
temporal_deltas.t1_to_current: The sprout remains stable; no other changes observed.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of near-total dormancy or failure. The only sign of life is a single, unidentified sprout in the lower black pot. The lack of expected specimens suggests a failure to establish or a recent clearing of the pots.
anomalies: Unidentified green sprout in the lower black pot.
Presence of white mineral/perlite debris in the lower black pot.
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical desk environment is currently devoid of the registered specimens (P1-P4). The pots appear to be largely empty, containing only soil and some surface debris. A single, small, green sprout has emerged in the lower black pot, which is the only active biological element observed. The white rabbit anchor in the P3 position remains the only constant feature.
